headline: Twitter Has Held Preliminary Talks About Combination With TikTok;  Microsoft Still Seen as Front-runner
Huawei Reportedly Set To Halt Manufacturing Of Kirin Chipsets
summary: Huawei will stop making its Kirin Chipsets beginning next month, according to the Chinese financial magazine Caixin.

headline: Barron's Picks And Pans: Berkshire Hathaway, Estee Lauder And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's cover story discusses how to prepare a portfolio for the upcoming elections. 
	Other featured articles look at stand-out dividend growth stocks, how to play dual-share stocks and who wins and loses from the shift in moviegoing.

headline: Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Apple, Ford, Merck, Uber And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	This week's bullish calls included pharmaceutical and ride-share leaders. 
	The e-commerce colossus and the iPhone maker were among the week's bearish calls.

headline: Tony Zhang's Cisco Trade
summary: On CNBC's "Options Action," Tony Zhang said that 2020 is going to be a turnaround year for Cisco Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: CSCO).
